agent: 09 UI / Soft Brand / Visual Regression Agent

visual_diffs.note: No baseline available - visual diff is by inspection of captured PNGs against design spec, not against prior captures.

soft_brand_checks.evidence: splash captures show cream gradient bg with rose only on CTA + emphasis

soft_brand_checks.rule: Pretendard JP only, no extra fonts
soft_brand_checks.evidence: src/index.css:13 - only Pretendard Variable @font-face; tokens-cartoon.css:120-126 comment explicitly forbids external CDN fonts
src/styles/tokens.css:598 body { font-weight: var(--weight-medium); }; runtime getComputedStyle reports '500' on all 10 viewports

soft_brand_checks.rule: card stroke + no shadow (elevated only floating)
soft_brand_checks.evidence: src/styles/tokens.css:630-635 .card { border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); box-shadow: var(--shadow-none); }
heavy shadow only on .card-elevated and brand glow variants
src/index.css:62-74 global user-select:none + touch-action:manipulation on button/a/[role=button]; .btn (tokens.css:715) and .btn-icon-circle (tokens.css:822-825) re-apply
src/styles/tokens.css:108 --status-danger #E03030; .btn-destructive (line 780-790) flat red; UrgentAlertOverlay.jsx:156 hero title uses var(--status-negative, #DC2626)
src/lib/theme.js:41-44 - #EF4444 selectable as child theme color, propagates to chips/markers/rails. See issue 1.
src/styles/tokens.css:729 .btn-primary rose + line 748 .btn-primary-mint defined; role-conditional rendering elsewhere

accessibility_surface_checks.note: 5 decorative imgs have alt='' wrapped by aria-labelled div - valid WCAG decorative pattern

accessibility_surface_checks.check: WCAG AA contrast on visible text

issues.title: Strong red (#EF4444) is selectable as child theme accent
issues.description: Memory rule design_color_rules.md restricts saturated red to SOS/긴급/하트 affordances. The theme palette in src/lib/theme.js still exposes #EF4444 (label '빨강') as a per-child accent color. Selecting it propagates strong red to chips, hero rail, card borders, and map markers for that child, visually colliding with the SOS/emergency affordance language.
issues.fix_hint: Remove #EF4444 from the selectable palette and swap to a softer rose like #FF6B9B, or desaturate the per-child runtime variant while keeping the saturated red reserved for safety chrome.

issues.title: 320x568 role-select CTA title wraps mid-word
issues.description: On the smallest supported viewport, role card titles '부모로 시작' and '자녀로 시작' wrap to two lines ('부모로 시 / 작'), looking broken as the first-impression screen. Mascot illustration consumes too much horizontal space relative to the title.
issues.fix_hint: On viewports under 360px, switch role card to a vertical (illustration above title) layout, reduce mascot size, or shorten copy to '부모' / '자녀'.

issues.title: Splash emphasis '시작' fails WCAG AA large-text contrast (2.54 < 3.0)
issues.description: The brand-rose accent on the splash heading word '시작' falls below the 3.0 WCAG AA large-text contrast minimum against the cream page background. Decorative emphasis only - meaning preserved without color - but still a measurable AA miss.
issues.fix_hint: Replace --brand-rose (#F779A8) with --brand-rose-deep (#D94F7F) for emphasis text, or pair the color with weight/underline.

issues.title: Role card chevron contrast 2.88 (decorative)
issues.description: 22px chevron on role cards is below 4.5 AA but is purely decorative; whole card is clickable and the title carries the action.
issues.fix_hint: Add aria-hidden='true', or swap color to var(--fg-tertiary) (5.4 ratio).

issues.title: .hyeni-v5-kid-chev uses font-weight 400 (the only literal 400 in codebase)
issues.description: Spec hard rule §4 forbids 400 for body. This is a decorative chevron, not body text, but ignores the token system (no --weight-* lower than 500 is defined).
issues.fix_hint: Change to font-weight: var(--weight-medium); the existing opacity 0.55 already attenuates visual weight.
